joke: Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired!
Why was the belt arrested? Because it held up a pair of pants!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why was 6 afraid of 7? Because 7 8 9!
Why was the computer cold? It left its Windows open!
Why are fish so smart? Because they live in schools!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the man throw his clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why don't cats play poker in the jungle? Too many cheetahs!
Why did the picture go to jail? Because it was framed!
Why did the football coach go to the bank? To get his quarter back!
Why did the kid bring a ladder to school? He wanted to go to high school!
Why did the man run around his bed? He was trying to catch up on his sleep!
Why did the robber take a bath? He wanted to make a clean getaway!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? Because it needed a root canal!
Why don't ghosts lie? You can see right through them!
Why are elevator jokes so good? They work on so many levels!
Why did the traffic light turn red? Because it had to change in the middle of the street!
Why did the gym close down? It just didn't work out!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed space!
Why did the man put his money in the freezer? He wanted cold hard cash!
Why was the broom late? It overswept!
Why was the piano locked out of the house? It lost its keys!
Why can't you trust stairs? They're always up to something!
Why did the plumber quit his job? Because it was too draining!
Why did the golfer wear two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
